case_title: HIGDON TERMITE & PEST CONT. VS MARTOCCHIO & SONS INC.DBA PINONEER BUILDERS

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $660.50 FILED BY HIGDON TERMITE & PEST CONT. AS TO DEFENDANT MARTOCCHIO & SONS INC.DBA PINONEER BUILDERS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-15-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 03
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
